summary: Frontend-only retest of (1) SCREENER mode-toggle bug fix and (2) RADAR detail table with Sparkline + AnalystGauge + Upside column. Mobile viewport 390x844. Both features PASS end-to-end with ZERO 'Unexpected text node' console errors (the iteration-2 SortableDataTable bug is fully resolved — primitives are now auto-wrapped in <Text> at SortableDataTable.tsx:182-196).

react_native_issues.issue: Boot-time warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' (2 occurrences). Pre-existing carry-over from iteration 2, low priority.

action_items: LOW (carry-over) — Migrate any remaining `pointerEvents` JSX prop to `style.pointerEvents` to silence the deprecation warning. Source location is likely inside SortableDataTable.tsx:119 (`<ScrollView pointerEvents='box-none' ...>`). Move to `style={{ pointerEvents: 'box-none' }}`.
critical_code_review_comments: SortableDataTable.tsx:119 still uses the deprecated `pointerEvents='box-none'` JSX prop. Move into style.

Radar columns define `sortValue: () => null` for the Trend column (radar.tsx:125). handleSort still toggles activeSort state when this header is tapped — UX-wise tapping Trend appears to do nothing (visually nothing changes). Consider gating header `onPress` if `sortValue` always returns null, or hide the caret/disable touch for non-sortable cols.
engine.ts inputMul hint-string detection (carry-over from iteration 2) — fragile, prefer explicit `inputScale` field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testIDs verified live on https://stock-news-hub-28.preview.emergentagent.com — Screener: screener-screen, mode-quick, mode-custom, preset-{quality,value,...}, screener-table, edit-filters, clear-filters, filter-close, filter-apply. Radar: radar-screen, radar-grid, radar-card-{strategy_key}, radar-back, radar-refresh, radar-table, row-{symbol} (88 rows for high_roce_low_debt US). SortableDataTable now wraps primitives in <Text>; columns can return either string/number or JSX (e.g. <Sparkline/>, <AnalystGauge/>) — both paths work cleanly.
rca_of_issue: Bug-fix verification: After preset-quality tap → screener-table renders; mode-quick tap → returns to preset grid (table gone, preset-quality card visible); mode-custom tap → screener-table renders again. Previously the second toggle was broken; now both segmented buttons switch views correctly. Radar feature verification: tapped radar-card-high_roce_low_debt → 88-row radar-table rendered with all 8 columns (SYM, PRICE, CHG%, TREND (30D), ANALYST RATING, UPSIDE, ROE, TOTAL DEBT TO EQUITY), 88 sparkline SVGs and 88 'Strong Buy/Buy/Hold/...' analyst-gauge labels visible. CHG% column color-toned (red/green) correctly. Sort header tap, refresh, back-to-grid all working. Zero 'Unexpected text node' / 'cannot be a child of <View>' errors in console (down from hundreds in iteration 2).
